title: Garden Games Giant Tumble Tower (Stack 0.6 M up to 1.5 M), Large Tumbling Timber Wooden Toppling Blocks Stacking Game for Kids Adults Family Indoor Outdoor Fun
features: Premium Quality Wood - Ustainably Sourced from Genuine Kiln Dried New Zealand Pine. Blocks Have Meticulously Rounded Edges with An Extra Smooth Finish.
Includes 54 Giant Tumble Tower Blocks (18 rows) , Each Block is 6 x 2 x 1.3 inch; 2 FT High and Could Be Grown Up to 4 FT Tall Tower When Played.

Set Up The Game, Stack All of The Blocks in levels of Three Placed Next to Each Other Along Their Long Sides and At a Right Angle to The Previous Level.Players Take Turns to Remove a Block From A Tower and Balance It on Top, Creating A Taller and Increasingly Unstable Structure As the Game Progresses.

Fun Exciting Game - Stack Blocks by Pulling Blocks Out of The Tower and Replacing Them at The Top Without The Tower Falling Over! Be Challenged and Develop Skills at the Same Time! Great for all Ages!

Jumbo Wooden Game is Easy to Take with You or To Conveniently Store in the 600D Oxford Canvas Bag ; Perfect for Indoor or Outdoor Events Such as Family Gathering, Picnics, Parties, BBQ's, Tailgating, Group Events, Camping and Everyday Backyard Fun
description: Product Description TUAHOO is a manufacturer specializing in various premium quality Outdoors & Indoors Backyard Lawn Family Game. We strive to keep everyone having an amazing time so that you can enjoy endless warm and sunny days outdoor activities with families and friends So round up the family, grab one of these games, Enjoy it with your kids, family, friends and love ones for everyday endless fun & exercise for stronger, and let the good times roll. Giant Tumble Tower for Kids Adults Family The giant tumble tower is an addictive game of focus, strategy, and a steady hand. Offers hours of outdoor entertainment for your Families,Friend,Colleagues. Players take turns to remove a block from a tower and balance it on top, creating a taller and increasingly unstable structure as the game progresses. this tumbling tower game helps developing your fine motor skills, improve your hand-eye coordination, enhance your balance, become more patient and acquire excellent self-control. Ustainably Sourced from Genuine Kiln Dried New Zealand Pine. Blocks Have Meticulously Rounded Edges with An Extra Smooth Finish. Includes 54 Giant Tumble Tower Blocks , Each Block is 6 x 2 x 1.3 inch; 2 FT High and Could Be Grown Up to 4 FT Tall Tower. Jumbo Wooden Game is Easy to Take with You or To Conveniently Store in the 600D Oxford Canvas Bag. Stack 0.6 M up to 1.5 M The Giant Tumble Tower comes with 54 pcs Wooden Blocks.The Stacking Games bring everyone challenge and fun, starting out at 2 FT (18 rows) tall and can be grown up to 4 FT + tall tower. Premium Quality Pinewood Ustainably Sourced from Genuine Kiln Dried New Zealand Pine. Blocks Have Meticulously Rounded Edges with An Extra Smooth Finish. Storage Bag for Easy Transport Jumbo Wooden Game is Easy to Take with You or To Conveniently Store in the 600D Oxford Canvas Bag. How to Play Giant Tumble Tower ? To set up the game, stack all of the blocks in sets of 3 with horizontal and vertical layers alternating with every level. Once the tower is built, all players take turns pulling a piece out one at a time and stacking one top of the highest level. Players can pick any spot on the highest level to place their piece. As players take turns pulling out blocks one by one the tower becomes less stable and much taller.there soon becomes less and less easier moves to build and the Giant Tower stacks to its highest point. Soon after, the tall tower tumbles with the losing player's turn that caused the large blocks to shift off balance for the Tumbling Tower to crumble. The game ends when a player’s move causes the tower to fall or a block to fall out of the tower (other than the one the player is moving).
